source_pr.title: store/tikv: move lock test to /tests
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
store/tikv has dependencies on `mockstore` and `unistore` because tests need to use them. We can resolve it by moving all tests to standaline package.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- move test files into `store/tikv/tests`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: sort.Slice(keys, func(i, j int) bool { (store/tikv/tests/lock_test.go).
